sortUrl:
@js:var input=String(source.sourceComment);var lines=input.split('
');var result=[];var groupName='';var content='';for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var line=lines[i].trim();if(line==='')continue;if(line.startsWith('◎')){if(groupName&&content){var encodedContent=java.base64Encode(content);result.push(`${groupName}::data:;base64,${encodedContent},{"type":""}`)}groupName=line.slice(1,-1).trim();content=''}else if(line.startsWith('【')){content+=line+'
'}}if(groupName&&content){var encodedContent=java.base64Encode(content);result.push(`${groupName}::data:;base64,${encodedContent},{"type":""}`)}result.join("
")
